作者是个比较负责任的人，这本书，能够以前面十万字的质量和节奏，写到一百万字左右。
如果成绩够作者生活，会一直写到百万字结尾。
所以，希望追读下去的读者老爷们，看到章节末尾，能够点点催更，多多评论自然就更好。
拜谢！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1638932349,"group_id":"7034355181848366115","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为读者大大们的身心愉悦作奉献","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5CfkzvXn6VENbwVIeoW700=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/047a9bae64e5472b819d9849fcccc881~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793612&x-signature=QuFdas2lCPrT%2BHGVgib6Ql9be0M%3D","user_id":"822078843131437","user_name":"暴躁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"822078843131437","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_5","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.5","title_id":"author_level_5"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.5","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.5"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7034355181848366115","book_info":{"abstract":"顾凡穿越玄幻世界，开局就是噬神体，只要吞噬资源就能变强。
